name: construction contractors processing 5–15 bids/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 bids/month, inconsistent bid formats cause delays in proposal acceptance. We convert bids into standardized proposals instead of manual proposal creation using word processors or spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent bid formats lead to confusion and delays in proposal acceptance.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inconsistent bid formats lead to confusion and delays in proposal acceptance.
